extension.description: Safe input buffer for complex CLI tools in integrated terminal. Solves CJK garbled text and backspace misalignment.
command.focus: Terminal Input Assistant: Focus Input Panel
config.title: Terminal Input Assistant
config.clearAfterSend: Automatically clear input box after sending
views.panel.name: Input Assistant
